prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-DOWNCLEANER-GALLON Product Type: CLEANING_AGENT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Revivex Down Cleaner and Wash for Jackets and Sleeping Bags, 1 Gallon Description: Not sure how to clean down comforters, jackets and sleeping bags? Wonder no more. Just use Revivex Down Cleaner by GEAR AID and you can clean your favorite down like a pro without the expensive bill. This gentle formula preserves natural oils to restore the loft and warmth you thought was gone forever.

Perfect for all down, including DownTek and other water repellent down products, just one wash per season will keep your down lofty and warm. It will also gently clean waterproof breathable shell fabrics, making it a necessary step before treating with Revivex Durable Water Repellent.

With Revivex it's easy to take great care of your down sleeping bag, coat, and vests. Keep it clean and stay warm, naturally. Search Terms: down cleaner jacket for clothes washer revivex sleeping bag rain and concentrate comforter coat Features: - Restore loft and warmth while removing dirt and grime on down-filled jackets, vests, sleeping bags and pillows with this gentle down wash detergent - Wash technical fabrics and down insulation safely using this mild formula which contains no perfumes, softeners or optical brighteners - One 10 fl oz pouch of this concentrated down wash formula cleans up to 10 jackets or 5 sleeping bags and is HE compatible - Use on all products with feather insulation including comforters, duvets, down blends and treated down - Packaging may vary === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Revivex Down Cleaner, 1 Gallon

anthropic.title_differentiation: Restore Loft And Warmth, Gentle Formula, Cleans Jackets And Sleeping Bags, HE Compatible, Concentrated Wash

openai.title_differentiation: Gentle Down Wash Detergent, Restores Loft And Warmth, For Jackets Sleeping Bags And Pillows, HE Compatible
